title: An Accord of Salt and Silk
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A Persian merchant's daughter and a Han Chinese diplomat must pose as a married couple to smuggle silkworm eggs out of the Tang Empire, only to find the counterfeit intimacy hardening into something dangerously real.
long_description: A Persian merchant's daughter and a Han Chinese diplomat must pose as a married couple to smuggle silkworm eggs out of the Tang Empire, only to find the counterfeit intimacy hardening into something dangerously real.
